title: BeatsComposition
description: Envelope for a finished master assembled from one or more BeatsShare ingredients. Each entry in tracks references a /o/{cid} BeatsShare and places a slice of it on a bar timeline. The composition's CID (base58 sha2-256 of canonical-JSON bytes) is sealed at /c/{cid}; rendered audio masters land at /audio-master/{cid}.{ext}. This first version is intentionally minimal — per-track operations (solo/mute/transpose/tempo-match), generative inserts, and master FX chains beyond loudnorm are reserved for later versions of the schema.

@context.description: JSON-LD context URL. Canonical value is the hosted context document.

tempo.description: Optional advisory tempo in BPM. The first PR ignores this — assembly does not stretch ingredient audio. Reserved for tempoMatch in a later PR.

tracks.description: Ordered list of ingredients placed on the master timeline. Each entry slices a BeatsShare ingredient and drops it at the given bar offset.

source.description: Either a reference to an existing share (cid) or a generative insert spec (generate). Mutually exclusive — exactly one shape per track.

id.description: Optional id so other tracks can reference this one (e.g. counterMelody.of). When omitted, sibling tracks fall back to numeric index.

in.description: Bar offset on the master timeline where this slice begins.

len.description: Number of bars to take from the ingredient.

soloRoles.description: Render only nets whose track.group matches one of these roles (drums/bass/melody/harmony/arp/pad/stinger/...). When set, all other groups are muted before the ingredient renders.

mute.description: Mute nets whose track.group matches one of these roles. Applied AFTER soloRoles, so mute can further trim a soloed render.

transposeSemis.description: Pitch-shift the slice by this many semitones via ffmpeg rubberband. Pitch-preserving, so groove and tempo are unchanged. Default 0.

tempoMatch.description: Bring the ingredient to the composition's master tempo. 'stretch' uses ffmpeg atempo (pitch-preserving). 'repitch' uses asetrate (pitch shifts as side effect). 'none' (default) leaves the audio at its native tempo.

gain.description: Per-track volume trim in dB applied before the bus mix. Default 0.

cid.description: CID of an existing BeatsShare envelope at /o/{cid}.

InsertSpec.description: Generative insert. Discriminated by the `type` field. PR-4.1+4.2 ship riser, drone, impact, texture (pure-DSP); counterMelody arrives in PR-4.3 with a chromedp+Tone.js render path.

shape.description: Source spectrum for the sweep. Default 'white-noise'.

fStart.description: Start cutoff Hz of the high-pass sweep. Default 80.

fEnd.description: End cutoff Hz of the high-pass sweep — the riser climbs to this frequency over its full duration. Default 8000.

level.description: Peak dB of the riser at the end of its build. Default -6.

rootHz.description: Hz of the fundamental sine. Drone adds a fifth (×1.5) and an octave (×2) on top. Default 220 (A3).

level.description: Peak dB after summing the three sines. Default -12 (sits under the mix).
Peak dB. Default -3 (drops hit louder than ambient layers).
Peak dB. Default -30 (texture is intentionally subliminal).

of.description: id of a sibling track in tracks[]. The source share referenced by that track is the one this counter-melody answers.

density.description: 0..1 — how often the counter-melody speaks. Default 0.5.

register.description: Octave offset relative to the source's pitch material. Default above (+12 semitones).

seed.description: Optional explicit RNG seed. When omitted, the seed derives from a hash of the canonical spec + source share bytes — same composition + same source → same counter-melody.

instrument.description: Optional instrument id for the Tone.js render path (PR-4.3.2). Ignored by the v1 ffmpeg-sine synthesis.

Master.description: Master-bus settings. lufs/lra/format drive the loudnorm pass + format fan-out; preset/chain drive an optional pre-loudnorm filter graph that shapes timbre.

lufs.description: Integrated-loudness target in LUFS for the loudnorm pass. Default -16 (streaming-tier). Standard targets: -14 (loudness-war), -16 (Spotify/YouTube), -23 (EBU broadcast).

lra.description: Loudness-range target for loudnorm. Default 11 (pop). Lower values squash dynamics; higher values preserve them.

format.description: Ordered list of formats to fan out from the master WAV. Default ['wav','flac','mp3','webm']. The .wav is the lossless archive; .webm is the streaming derivative.

stems.description: Per-group stems to emit alongside the master. Each entry is a track.group label (drums/bass/lead/pad/...). For each named group the worker re-renders the composition with every cid track soloed to that group (and generative inserts muted), uploading the result to /audio-stems/{cid}/{group}.{ext}. Useful for remixers who want individual layers.

preset.description: Named master-chain shorthand. Expanded to a canonical chain when `chain` is absent. Ignored when `chain` is set. CID-stable: only the preset name is canonicalised, not the expanded chain — preset values may evolve, so authors who want byte-stable masters across software versions should pin an explicit chain.

chain.description: Ordered mastering filter chain. Each step compiles to one ffmpeg fragment. Runs BEFORE loudnorm. Canonical order is highpass → compress → eq → limiter → stereoWiden; author-supplied chains are NOT reordered (the assembler emits a soft warning if the order deviates).

tilt.description: Symmetrical low/high shelf in dB. Negative = brighter; positive = darker.

presence.description: 4 kHz peaking EQ gain in dB.

amount.description: Side gain. 0 = mono-safe; 0.2 = subtle; 1.0 = aggressive. Default 0.2.
